name: modalot ver. 0.10
description: Standalone moderation plugin with per-platform blacklist rule tabs for Twitch, Kick and YouTube. TikTok moderation is hidden and disabled because TikTok currently has no supported moderation API here.
description_de: Eigenständiges Moderations-Plugin mit plattformbezogenen Sperrlistenregeln für Twitch, Kick und YouTube.
description_en: Standalone moderation plugin with platform-specific blacklist rules for Twitch, Kick and YouTube.
